# Meraki Roofing — Complete Business Information

> Meraki Roofing (legal name: Meraki Restoration, LLC) is a GAF Certified Plus
> roofing contractor based in El Paso, Texas. Locally owned and operated,
> rated 4.8 stars with 50+ verified reviews. Specializes in residential and
> commercial roofing with free drone-assisted roof inspections using DJI M30T
> thermal imaging technology.

## Company Overview

- **Business Name**: Meraki Roofing (DBA Meraki Restoration, LLC)
- **Location**: El Paso, TX 79905
- **Phone**: (915) 861-8039
- **Website**: https://merakirestoration.com
- **Rating**: 4.8 stars, 50+ verified reviews
- **Certification**: GAF Certified Plus (top 7% of US roofers)
- **License**: Licensed, Bonded & Insured in Texas
- **Languages**: English, Spanish

## Service Area

Meraki Roofing serves the following cities and communities:

- El Paso, TX (primary)
- Las Cruces, NM
- Chaparral, NM
- Anthony, TX/NM
- Canutillo, TX
- Santa Teresa, NM
- Fabens, TX
- Clint, TX
- Horizon City, TX
- Socorro, TX

## Residential Roofing Services

Meraki Roofing provides complete residential roofing services including new roof installation, roof replacement, roof repair, and ongoing maintenance.

### Materials Offered
- **Asphalt Shingles**: $3.75–$7.00 per sq ft. GAF Timberline HDZ (Class 4 impact resistance). 25–50 year lifespan.
- **Metal Roofing**: $9.00–$14.00 per sq ft. Standing seam and metal shingle options. 40–70 year lifespan.
- **Tile Roofing**: $8.00–$14.00 per sq ft. Concrete and clay tile options. 50–100 year lifespan.
- **Slate Roofing**: $15.00–$30.00 per sq ft. Natural slate installation. 75–200 year lifespan.
- **Flat Roofing**: $3.20–$7.00 per sq ft. TPO, EPDM, and modified bitumen systems.

### Typical Cost Range
A full residential roof replacement in El Paso typically costs $5,000–$15,000+ depending on home size, material selected, and roof complexity.

### Warranty
- 10-year workmanship warranty on all installations
- GAF Golden Pledge Limited Warranty: up to 50 years material + 25 years workmanship

## Commercial Roofing Services

Meraki Roofing serves retail buildings, warehouses, offices, and industrial facilities.

### Commercial Systems
- TPO (Thermoplastic Polyolefin) — energy-efficient, UV resistant
- EPDM (Rubber Roofing) — durable, cost-effective
- Modified Bitumen — multi-layer weather protection
- Built-Up Roofing (BUR) — traditional, proven performance
- Metal Standing Seam — long lifespan, low maintenance
- Spray Foam with Coatings — seamless, excellent insulation

### Commercial Cost Range
Commercial roof replacement: $4–$12 per square foot depending on system and roof size.

## Storm Damage Repair

- **24/7 emergency response** with under 2-hour average response time in El Paso
- Emergency tarping to prevent further water damage
- Hail damage, wind damage, and water damage specialists
- Free emergency drone inspections with thermal imaging
- Complete insurance claims management included

## Insurance Claims Services

- Full claims management from documentation to settlement
- Drone photography and thermal imaging for damage documentation
- Adjuster meeting coordination and attendance
- Estimate negotiation and supplement filing
- 500+ insurance claims filed for El Paso homeowners
- Most homeowners pay $0 out-of-pocket (insurance covers cost minus deductible)
- Works with all major Texas insurance carriers

## Drone Roof Inspections

- **Technology**: DJI Matrice 30T (M30T) enterprise drone
- **Capabilities**: 48MP visual camera + FLIR thermal imaging sensor
- **Detects**: Hidden moisture, insulation gaps, active leaks, structural damage
- **Cost**: Free for homeowners and commercial property owners
- **Duration**: 15–30 minutes residential, 30–60 minutes commercial
- **Report**: Detailed annotated photos and thermal imagery within 24 hours
- **Safety**: Non-invasive (no one walks on your roof), FAA Part 107 certified pilots

## Roof Maintenance Programs

Three maintenance tiers available:

- **Essential Plan**: $449/year — bi-annual inspections, basic preventive repairs, condition reports
- **Premium Plan**: Enhanced inspections, priority scheduling, expanded repair coverage
- **Elite Plan**: Comprehensive coverage including gutter cleaning, drone thermal scans, priority emergency response

Benefits: Extends roof lifespan by 5–15 years, saves up to $2,400 in avoided repairs.

## Financing Options

- $0 down payment
- Low monthly payments
- Quick approval (most approved within minutes)
- Terms up to 15 years
- Available for residential and commercial projects
- Multiple lending partners for competitive rates

## GAF Certification

Meraki Roofing is GAF Certified Plus, a designation earned by only 7% of roofing contractors in the United States. This certification requires:
- Factory-trained installation crews
- Proper licensing and insurance
- Proven track record of customer satisfaction
- Ongoing education and training

GAF Certified Plus enables enhanced warranties including the GAF Golden Pledge Limited Warranty (50 years material + 25 years workmanship).

Primary product: GAF Timberline HDZ architectural shingles — America's #1 selling shingle with Class 4 impact resistance.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does a roof replacement cost in El Paso?
A typical roof replacement in El Paso ranges from $5,000 to $15,000+ depending on home size, material, and complexity. Asphalt shingles are most affordable ($3.75–$7.00/sq ft); metal and tile are premium options.

### Does Meraki Roofing offer free roof inspections?
Yes. Meraki Roofing provides free roof inspections for homeowners and commercial property owners, including advanced drone inspections with thermal imaging at no cost.

### How quickly does Meraki respond to storm damage?
Meraki Roofing offers 24/7 emergency storm response with average response time under 2 hours in the El Paso area.

### Does insurance cover roof damage from hail?
Most Texas homeowner insurance policies cover hail and wind damage minus your deductible. Meraki handles the entire claims process. Most homeowners pay $0 out-of-pocket.

### What areas does Meraki Roofing serve?
Meraki Roofing serves El Paso TX, Las Cruces NM, Chaparral, Anthony, Canutillo, Santa Teresa, Fabens, Clint, Horizon City, and Socorro.

### What makes Meraki different from other El Paso roofers?
Meraki Roofing is one of the few El Paso roofers offering drone thermal inspections, GAF Certified Plus warranties, and full insurance claims management. We combine advanced technology with hands-on customer service.
